name: Sudoku for bro
description: Sudoku Puzzle Game Sudoku is a classic logic-based puzzle game designed to challenge your brain and improve your concentration. The goal is simple: fill the 9×9 grid so that every row, column, and 3×3 sub-grid contains all numbers from 1 to 9 without repetition. This game features multiple difficulty levels, making it perfect for both beginners and experienced Sudoku players. Use hints when you get stuck, check your progress for mistakes, or solve the puzzle instantly if you want to learn the solution. The game is fully responsive and works smoothly on desktop and mobile devices. Advertisements are seamlessly integrated and automatically p
instructions: Mouse Touch Click or tap on any empty cell to select it Keyboard 1 ndash 9 Type a number from 1 to 9 to fill the selected cell Backspace Delete Remove the number from the selected cell Hint Button Watch an advertisement to receive a correct h
